THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JIANG, FU XIAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RECHEVSKIY, ALEX DBA  PACIFIC CUSTOM FLOORING LUGO, VICTOR P $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $530.00, THE COURT FINDS THAT MOST OF THE DAMAGE CLAIMED BY PLAINTIFF WAS PRE-EXISTING.
